theme.en: Memory Scarcity Pulls Policy Into the Stack
theme.zh: 存储短缺把政策拉进供应链

dek.en: AI hardware demand is forcing buyers, memory makers, packaging partners, and governments to reopen supply choices. Today's strongest signals are not only about faster accelerators, but about where scarce HBM, DRAM, and advanced packaging capacity can be sourced.
dek.zh: AI硬件需求正在迫使买方、存储厂、封装伙伴和政府重新审视供应选择。今天最强的信号不只是加速器更快，而是稀缺的HBM、DRAM和先进封装产能究竟能从哪里取得。

title.en: AI & Accelerators
title.zh: AI与加速器

title.en: Supermicro Shows Its GB300 Super AI Station
title.zh: Supermicro展示GB300 Super AI Station

summary.en: ServeTheHome takes a close look at Supermicro's GB300 Super AI Station as Nvidia DGX Station-class systems begin shipping. The system centers on Nvidia's GB300 platform and a 208-billion-transistor package, putting workstation-form-factor AI hardware closer to server-class inference and fine-tuning workflows. The practical question is how much of this class of hardware can be supplied while memory and power budgets remain tight.
summary.zh: ServeTheHome近距离观察了Supermicro的GB300 Super AI Station，而Nvidia DGX Station级系统也已开始出货。该系统围绕Nvidia GB300平台和2080亿晶体管级封装展开，把工作站形态的AI硬件推向更接近服务器级推理和微调的场景。真正的问题在于，在存储和功耗预算都紧张的情况下，这类硬件能供应多少。

title.en: Foundry & Manufacturing
title.zh: 晶圆代工与制造

title.en: TSMC and Amkor Form a 10-Year Arizona Advanced Packaging Partnership
title.zh: TSMC与Amkor达成10年亚利桑那先进封装合作

summary.en: TSMC and Amkor have formed a 10-year partnership for advanced semiconductor packaging in Arizona. The deal matters because US leading-edge wafer capacity is only useful for AI and HPC customers if adjacent packaging capacity can keep pace. It also extends the Arizona story beyond front-end fab construction into the CoWoS-like bottlenecks that determine actual accelerator supply.
summary.zh: TSMC与Amkor达成了为期10年的亚利桑那先进半导体封装合作。该协议的重要性在于，对AI和HPC客户来说，美国本土先进制程晶圆产能只有在相邻封装产能跟得上时才真正有用。它也把亚利桑那叙事从前道晶圆厂建设延伸到决定加速器实际供给的CoWoS类瓶颈。

title.en: Texas Awards a $3 Million Grant for an Austin Semiconductor Facility
title.zh: 得州向奥斯汀半导体设施拨款300万美元

summary.en: Texas awarded a $3 million grant tied to an Austin semiconductor facility. The number is modest next to federal CHIPS Act awards, but state-level grants are becoming part of the site-selection stack for fabs, suppliers, and packaging operations. For local clusters, small public grants can still affect timing by offsetting facility and workforce costs.
summary.zh: 得州向一个奥斯汀半导体设施提供了300万美元拨款。与联邦CHIPS Act补贴相比，这个金额不大，但州级激励正成为晶圆厂、供应商和封装业务选址的一部分。对本地产业集群来说，小额公共资金仍可能通过抵消厂房和劳动力成本来影响项目节奏。

title.en: Memory
title.zh: 存储

title.en: Samsung Begins Shipments of HBM4 Products
title.zh: Samsung开始出货HBM4产品

summary.en: Samsung has begun shipments of HBM4 products, according to a WSJ-cited item in the candidate feed. That is a material signal because HBM4 qualification and customer allocation will shape the next phase of Nvidia, AMD, and custom-accelerator platforms. For Samsung, the shipment headline also tests whether it can regain share after SK hynix and Micron led much of the HBM3E narrative.
summary.zh: 候选源中引用WSJ的报道显示，Samsung已经开始出货HBM4产品。这是一个重要信号，因为HBM4的认证和客户分配将塑造Nvidia、AMD以及定制加速器平台的下一阶段。对Samsung而言，这条出货消息也在检验其能否在SK hynix和Micron主导HBM3E叙事后重新夺回份额。

title.en: Jefferies Warns of 50% and 40% Memory Price Jumps in Late 2026
title.zh: Jefferies警告2026年下半年存储价格将连续大涨

summary.en: Jefferies expects memory prices to rise 50% in Q3 2026 and another 40% in Q4, with no broad relief until 2028. The forecast reflects persistent shortages across DRAM and AI-linked memory rather than a short seasonal squeeze. If the pricing path holds, OEMs will face margin pressure while memory suppliers gain more room to fund HBM and advanced-node DRAM capacity.
summary.zh: Jefferies预计存储价格将在2026年三季度上涨50%，四季度再上涨40%，并且到2028年前难以全面缓解。这个预测反映的是DRAM和AI相关存储的持续短缺，而不是短期季节性挤压。如果这一路径成立，OEM将承受利润率压力，而存储供应商将获得更多资金空间来投入HBM和先进制程DRAM产能。

title.en: Policy & Geopolitics
title.zh: 政策与地缘政治

title.en: Apple Reportedly Seeks US Clearance to Buy CXMT Memory
title.zh: Apple据称寻求美国批准采购CXMT存储

summary.en: Apple is reportedly lobbying Washington for permission to buy lower-cost memory from CXMT, a Chinese supplier designated as a Chinese military company but not fully banned. The request shows how severe memory pricing has become for even the largest device makers. It also puts US export-control and procurement policy in direct contact with consumer-electronics bills of materials.
summary.zh: Apple据称正在华盛顿游说，希望获准从CXMT采购成本更低的存储芯片；CXMT被列为中国军工企业，但并未被完全禁止交易。这一请求显示，即便是最大规模的终端厂商也已经感受到存储价格压力。它还把美国出口管制和采购政策直接推到了消费电子BOM面前。

title.en: India-US Tech Partnership Shifts AI and Chip Projects Toward the Private Sector
title.zh: 印美技术伙伴关系把AI和芯片项目推向私营部门

summary.en: The India-US strategic technology push is turning toward private-sector execution for AI and semiconductor projects. That matters because public frameworks only become supply-chain capacity when companies commit capital, customers, and engineering teams. The signal is less about a single fab and more about how Washington and New Delhi want to translate policy alignment into commercial chip infrastructure.
summary.zh: 印美战略技术合作正把AI和半导体项目的执行重心转向私营部门。这一点重要，是因为公共政策框架只有在企业投入资本、客户和工程团队后，才会转化为真实供应链能力。这个信号并不指向某一座晶圆厂，而是显示华盛顿和新德里希望把政策协同转化为商业芯片基础设施。

title.en: Earnings & Markets
title.zh: 财报与市场

title.en: Micron Points to a $100 Billion HBM Market in 2027 and Raises FY26 Capex
title.zh: Micron称2027年HBM市场将超过1000亿美元并上调FY26资本开支

summary.en: Micron signaled that the HBM total addressable market could cross $100 billion in 2027 while lifting fiscal 2026 capex to around $27 billion. The capex move is the important part: suppliers are being rewarded for adding advanced memory capacity, but they also risk extending the cycle if end demand softens. For now, the spending plan reinforces that HBM, not commodity DRAM alone, is setting memory industry priorities.
summary.zh: Micron表示2027年HBM总可服务市场可能超过1000亿美元，并将2026财年资本开支提高到约270亿美元。更关键的是资本开支动作：供应商因增加先进存储产能而获得回报，但如果终端需求放缓，也可能拉长周期风险。至少目前，这一支出计划再次说明，决定存储行业优先级的是HBM，而不只是传统商品DRAM。

title.en: ON Semiconductor Is Buying Synaptics in a $7 Billion All-Stock Deal
title.zh: ON Semiconductor将以70亿美元全股票交易收购Synaptics

summary.en: ON Semiconductor is buying Synaptics in a $7 billion all-stock transaction. The deal would broaden ON beyond power and sensing into more edge, connectivity, and interface silicon at a time when automotive and industrial demand remains uneven. All-stock consideration also means the market will judge whether the strategic fit offsets dilution and integration risk.
summary.zh: ON Semiconductor将以70亿美元全股票交易收购Synaptics。该交易将把ON的业务从功率和传感进一步扩展到边缘、连接和接口芯片，而当前汽车和工业需求仍不均衡。全股票支付也意味着市场会衡量战略协同是否足以抵消稀释和整合风险。

title.en: Challengers & New Silicon
title.zh: 新势力与新硅

title.en: Tenstorrent's Jim Keller Talks Cerebras, Intel, and Qualcomm
title.zh: Tenstorrent的Jim Keller谈Cerebras、Intel与Qualcomm

summary.en: Jim Keller said Cerebras' IPO was helpful for the AI-chip challenger category and said Tenstorrent has met with Intel and Qualcomm while seeking a large deal. The comments are not a customer win, but they show how quickly non-Nvidia silicon companies are trying to convert architecture claims into strategic partnerships. Tenstorrent's BlackHole Galaxy pitch will need named deployments before it clears the next bar.
summary.zh: Jim Keller表示Cerebras IPO对AI芯片新势力类别有帮助，并称Tenstorrent已经与Intel和Qualcomm CEO会面，希望拿下大单。这些表态还不是客户订单，但显示非Nvidia硅公司正试图把架构主张转化为战略合作。Tenstorrent的BlackHole Galaxy叙事要跨过下一道门槛，还需要有具名部署。

title.en: Etched Takes 80,000 Square Feet in Milpitas
title.zh: Etched在Milpitas拿下8万平方英尺空间

summary.en: Etched has taken 80,000 square feet in Milpitas, according to a local report. Real estate is not the same as production silicon, but a facility commitment is a tangible scaling signal for an AI-chip startup. The next checkpoint is whether the space supports engineering, bring-up, or customer deployment rather than simply corporate growth.
summary.zh: 当地报道显示，Etched在Milpitas拿下了8万平方英尺空间。办公和设施扩张不等于量产硅片，但对AI芯片初创公司来说，这是一个更具体的扩张信号。下一步要看这块空间用于工程、bring-up还是客户部署，而不只是公司规模增长。

theme.en: Data Movement Sets the Research Agenda
theme.zh: 数据搬移主导研究议程

dek.en: This week's stronger papers treat memory placement, interconnect overhead, photonic switching, and safety verification as first-order design problems. The common thread is that compute blocks matter less when data movement, topology, and packaging constraints dominate system behavior.
dek.zh: 本周较强的论文把存储位置、互连开销、光子交换和安全验证视为一阶设计问题。共同线索是，当数据搬移、拓扑和封装约束主导系统行为时，单个计算模块本身的重要性会下降。

title.en: Devices & Process
title.zh: 器件与工艺

title.en: Non-Volatile Silicon Mach-Zehnder Switches Using Graphene Heaters and Sb2Se3 Phase Change Material
title.zh: 基于Graphene加热器和Sb2Se3相变材料的非易失硅Mach-Zehnder开关

papers.authors: J. Samland, F. Hoff, T. Veslin, et al.

summary.en: Samland et al. experimentally demonstrate non-volatile silicon Mach-Zehnder switches using Sb2Se3 phase-change material switched by graphene heaters. The reported device reaches a 0.7 pi phase shift, VpiL of about 0.56 Vcm, and a 28 dB extinction ratio. The result is useful for neuromorphic and reconfigurable PICs because the optical state can persist without continuous heater power, though the path to dense, repeatable arrays still depends on process control and cycling data.
summary.zh: Samland等人实验展示了使用Sb2Se3相变材料、由graphene加热器切换的非易失硅Mach-Zehnder开关。器件实现了0.7π相移、约0.56 Vcm的VπL和28 dB消光比。这个结果对神经形态和可重构PIC有价值，因为光学状态无需持续加热功耗即可保持，但走向高密度、可重复阵列仍取决于工艺控制和循环可靠性数据。

title.en: Scalable Silicon Photonic MEMS Switches with Quasi-Buckling-Free Directional Couplers
title.zh: 采用准无翘曲方向耦合器的可扩展硅光子MEMS开关

papers.authors: Y. Hu, J. Zhu, Y. Liu, et al.

summary.en: Hu et al. co-design the mechanics and optics of a 2x2 horizontal adiabatic-directional-coupler MEMS switch to suppress buckling. The fabricated switches show broad 180 nm bandwidth, roughly 2 microsecond switching, more than 7.2 billion cycles, and a demonstrated 64x64 Benes array. That combination makes the work more relevant to AI optical switching fabrics than a single-device photonics result, although packaging and control overhead remain the scaling tests.
summary.zh: Hu等人对2x2水平绝热方向耦合器MEMS开关进行机光协同设计，以抑制翘曲。实测开关具备180 nm宽带、约2微秒切换速度、超过72亿次循环，并展示了64x64 Benes阵列。这个组合使其相比单器件光子结果更接近AI光交换网络需求，不过封装和控制开销仍是规模化考验。

title.en: Circuits & Architecture
title.zh: 电路与架构

title.en: Scratchpad Memory and Heterogeneity Trade-offs in CGRAs
title.zh: CGRA中Scratchpad Memory与异构性的权衡

papers.authors: M. J. Belda, L. Orlandic, F. Castro, et al.

summary.en: Belda et al. evaluate how scratchpad memory and heterogeneous processing elements change CGRA behavior on FFT, GEMM, and a seizure-detection transformer workload. The scratchpad reduces memory traffic by 8x versus a memory-less design, while the homogeneous architecture cuts area overhead by 4.4x to 8.2x compared with prior CGRAs. The paper is useful because it separates data-movement wins from PE-specialization wins instead of treating CGRA efficiency as one knob.
summary.zh: Belda等人在FFT、GEMM和癫痫检测Transformer工作负载上评估scratchpad memory与异构处理单元如何改变CGRA表现。相较无本地存储设计，scratchpad将存储流量降低8倍；而同构架构相对既有CGRA把面积开销降低4.4倍到8.2倍。论文的价值在于把数据搬移收益和PE专用化收益拆开分析，而不是把CGRA效率视为单一旋钮。

title.en: Location-Aware Scheduling for Multitasking MCM-GPUs
title.zh: 面向多任务MCM-GPU的位置感知调度

papers.authors: T. Zhang, G. Zhang, Y. He, et al.

summary.en: Zhang et al. show that placement decisions become first-order when multiple applications share a multi-chip-module GPU. Some workload pairs perform better when co-located on the same GPU chip to maximize memory bandwidth use, while others benefit from being split across chips to reduce contention. That observation maps directly to cloud GPU scheduling as chiplet GPUs become the norm rather than an exotic package choice.
summary.zh: Zhang等人指出，当多个应用共享多芯片模块GPU时，任务放置会成为一阶性能因素。有些工作负载组合放在同一GPU芯片上更利于利用存储带宽，另一些则适合跨芯片分布以降低争用。随着chiplet GPU成为常态而不再是特殊封装选择，这个观察直接映射到云端GPU调度。

title.en: AI Accelerators & Compute-in-Memory
title.zh: AI加速器与存算一体

title.en: Protocol and Software Co-Optimization for dGPU In-Kernel ML
title.zh: 面向dGPU内核内机器学习的协议与软件协同优化

papers.authors: W. Li, S. Zhu, P. Cuan, et al.

summary.en: Li et al. target the PCIe and software-path bottleneck that makes small-batch in-kernel ML offload unattractive on dGPUs. Their co-optimization combines feature selection, mixed-precision quantization, lightweight compression, and adaptive transfer scheduling, cutting transferred bytes by 50% to 87.5%. The key result is that the dGPU break-even batch size drops from 256 to 64 and latency falls 3.2x to 5.8x, showing that protocol overhead can dominate raw accelerator throughput.
summary.zh: Li等人针对小批量内核内机器学习卸载到dGPU时的PCIe和软件路径瓶颈。其协同优化结合特征选择、混合精度量化、轻量压缩和自适应传输调度，把传输字节数减少50%到87.5%。关键结果是dGPU盈亏平衡批量从256降到64，端到端延迟降低3.2倍到5.8倍，说明协议开销可能压过原始加速器吞吐。

title.en: A Neuromorphic Silicon Suite in SkyWater 130 nm
title.zh: 基于SkyWater 130 nm的神经形态硅IP套件

summary.en: Kumaresan and Sivasubramani present four interface-compatible neuromorphic IP blocks in SkyWater 130 nm: a PVT sensor, stochastic LIF neuron, STDP controller, and memristive-crossbar controller. The blocks share an SPI register file and were verified with 99 cocotb tests at RTL and gate level. It is not a production neuromorphic chip yet, but open, standard-cell blocks lower the barrier for reproducible edge-neuromorphic experiments.
summary.zh: Kumaresan和Sivasubramani在SkyWater 130 nm中提出4个接口兼容的神经形态IP模块：PVT传感器、随机LIF神经元、STDP控制器和memristive crossbar控制器。这些模块共享SPI寄存器文件，并通过99个RTL和门级cocotb测试验证。它还不是量产神经形态芯片，但开放的标准单元模块降低了可复现实验门槛。

title.en: Low-Power Analogue Neural Networks with Trainable Nonlinear Connections
title.zh: 具备可训练非线性连接的低功耗模拟神经网络

papers.authors: I. T. Vidamour, F. Aguirre, T. J. Hayward, et al.

summary.en: Vidamour et al. put trainable nonlinear functions on analog neural-network connections rather than treating device nonlinearities as scalar weights. The approach maps well to smooth continuous-control tasks, transfers across about 35,000 hardware connections, and is projected at roughly 30 microwatts in a dedicated CMOS implementation. The caveat is important: the advantage is task-dependent and does not carry over cleanly to classification-like decision boundaries.
summary.zh: Vidamour等人把可训练非线性函数放在模拟神经网络连接上，而不是把器件非线性简单当作标量权重。该方法适合平滑连续控制任务，可迁移到约3.5万个硬件连接，并预计在专用CMOS实现中功耗约30微瓦。需要注意的是，这种优势依赖任务类型，并不能自然迁移到类似分类边界的问题。

title.en: AI Research for Hardware
title.zh: 面向硬件的AI研究

title.en: Physically Constrained Agents for Hardware-Aware Foundation Model Compression
title.zh: 面向硬件约束基础模型压缩的物理约束智能体

papers.authors: J. Zhang, W. Sun, C. Wang, et al.

summary.en: Zhang et al. build a physically grounded multi-agent discovery system for hardware-compliant foundation-model deployment. The generated methods include Q-Enhance for long-context dense models and MoE-Salient-AQ for sparse MoE quantization, with the paper claiming a 235B-parameter model deployed on dual A100s after a 75% memory reduction and 0.64% accuracy loss. The result is relevant because compression is framed around hardware constraints, but the claims need independent reproduction before they should guide accelerator roadmaps.
summary.zh: Zhang等人构建了一个具备物理约束的多智能体发现系统，用于符合硬件约束的基础模型部署。生成的方法包括面向长上下文稠密模型的Q-Enhance，以及面向稀疏MoE量化的MoE-Salient-AQ；论文声称在内存需求降低75%、精度损失0.64%的情况下，将235B参数模型部署到双A100服务器。该结果重要在于把压缩问题放入硬件约束中讨论，但相关主张仍需独立复现后才适合作为加速器路线图依据。

title.en: EDA & Verification
title.zh: EDA与验证

title.en: SafeGen Uses LLMs and Formal Verification for Functional-Safety Assertions
title.zh: SafeGen用LLM和形式验证生成函数安全断言

papers.authors: X. Tan, A. Chaudhuri, R. Parekhji, et al.

summary.en: Tan et al. propose SafeGen, an LLM-driven framework that generates functional-safety assertions and evaluates fault criticality with formal verification support. The system links safety documents, FMEDA guidance, RTL information, and generated assertions through a document-level Hyper Knowledge Graph. The value is traceability rather than text generation alone, but automotive-grade adoption will depend on how well the generated assertions survive adversarial and coverage audits.
summary.zh: Tan等人提出SafeGen，这是一个由LLM驱动、并结合形式验证来生成函数安全断言和评估故障关键性的框架。系统通过文档级Hyper Knowledge Graph把安全文档、FMEDA指南、RTL信息和生成断言连接起来。其价值不只是文本生成，而是可追溯性；不过要进入汽车级流程，还要看生成断言能否经受对抗性检查和覆盖率审计。

title.en: Quantum & Photonics
title.zh: 量子与光子

title.en: A Photonic Integrated Long-Distance Quantum Communication Network
title.zh: 光子集成长距离量子通信网络

papers.authors: L. Zhang, J. Pan, T.-Y. Chen, et al.

summary.en: Zhang et al. report a photonic integrated long-distance quantum communication network in Nature Photonics. The candidate metadata does not expose detailed performance numbers, but the venue and topic make it relevant to integrated quantum links rather than lab-bench optics alone. The paper belongs on the reading queue because photonic integration is one of the few credible routes to scaling quantum networking hardware.
summary.zh: Zhang等人在Nature Photonics报道了一个光子集成长距离量子通信网络。候选元数据没有给出详细性能数字，但从期刊和主题看，它更接近集成量子链路，而不只是实验台光学演示。该论文值得列入阅读队列，因为光子集成是扩展量子网络硬件的少数可信路径之一。
